Sarcoscypha Fungus  
 


This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Sarcoscypha Fungus

This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:0 pp 0 gp 1 sp 0 cp
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 05:20:55
Page Updated:Tue Dec 10th, 2024

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Drops | Quests | Recipes | Comments ]
This item is a ground spawn.

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

NPC Name
A Witness of Hate Seer

Deepest Guk: The Curse Reborn (Raid)
NPC Name
an alluring oculus

Deepest Guk: The Root Garden
NPC Name
Corrupted Oculus

Estate of Unrest
NPC Name
a mortuary fungus

Estate of Unrest: Greater Unrest (Level 85 - Hardcore Heritage)
NPC Name
Mortificator Fungus
mortuary fungus

Innothule Swamp
NPC Name
a corpse spore
a fungus spore
fungus man tracker

Upper Guk
NPC Name
a fungus ancient
a fungus breeder
a fungus drone
a fungus mutant
a fungus soldier

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Toxxulia Forest (Removed)
Quest Name
Underfoot Pre-Launch: Homebrew Extermination Tactics
Used in 3 recipes.
Recipe list - Premium only.

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Deepest Guk
Deepest Guk: The Curse Reborn (Raid)
Estate of Unrest
Estate of Unrest: Greater Unrest (Level 85 - Hardcore Heritage)
Innothule Swamp
Lesser Faydark
Swamp of No Hope
Upper Guk
Also a ground spawn.


Uploaded April 3rd, 2023 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Ground Spawns in Lesser Faydark
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2022 at 5:08 PM Rating: Excellent
Wreck
Guru
181 posts
Spent quite a bit of time today in LFay working on this, and came up with some facts:

The ground spawns have a respawn timer of about an hour. It's hard to lock it down to a precise time because of the number of spawns to watch. I would say definitely 55 minutes to 1 hour. At the 1 hour mark, they appeared to have all respawned.

I found (repeatedly) 12 ground spawns in the Faerie Camp, 11 ground spawns in the Brownie Compound (3 inside, 8 outside), and 11 ground spawns in the Undead Monument area. I could not find any ground spawns anywhere near the Pixie Tower. And I don't believe I ever have.

For the day, my ground spawns yielded the following:
203 - Sarcoscypha Fungus (+/- 1)
79 - Jack-O-Lantern Fungus
2 - Blue Slumber Fungus

I recall Blue Slumber Fungus being more prevalent in the past. I'm wondering if the lack of this type has something to do with the game time of day I harvested them or some such. The two I got were at the same "respawn session" and both in the Faerie Camp.

Dru
The Rathe server
▲ Page top
Ground Spawns in Lesser Faydark
QuoteReply
# Sep 06 2025 at 7:00 PM Rating: Decent
Mith
1 post
This post is very accurate. in LFay

However I also find spawns at the pixie tower. In 4 runs I got 93 sarco, 39 Jack and 2 Blue Slumber
▲ Page top
Ground Spawns in Lesser Faydark
QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2023 at 12:38 AM Rating: Excellent
riguild
Scholar
43 posts
There are ground spawns near the pixie tower, the problem is that the pixie npcs like tricksters n **** will pick up ground spawn items. You can find these there if a pixie hasn't pathed near one, or if you keep the pixies dead.
▲ Page top
Sarcoscypha Fungus
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2022 at 9:47 PM Rating: Good
Lemuello
View User Forum
Scholar
77 posts
can be found around Brownie camp, Pixie tower, Faerie camp, and the undead monument. Haven't found them other places. I found it was faster to move between those spots than wait for ground spawn re-pop. They look like little red mushrooms and can be Sarcoscypha Fungus or Jack-o-lantern fungus. Blue mushrooms are Blue Slumber Fungus.
▲ Page top
Sarcoscypha Fungus

Blue mushrooms are Blue Slumber Fungus.

Dye farming
QuoteReply
# Jun 02 2015 at 2:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1719793000182
22 posts
If you want this stuff go to Lesser fay, it's all over the ground in the Fairy camp and a good bit around the Brownies too. 30 pick ups netted me 18 of these, 10 Jack-O-Lantern and 2 Blue Slumber. All good for dyes.
▲ Page top
lfay spawn points
QuoteReply
# May 14 2013 at 7:58 AM Rating: Decent
knife
Sage
59 posts
here are a list of the lfay ground spawn points. the ones with jack added are ones I got jack o lantern fungus . the one that says blue slumber fungus is the ground spawn that is
the color blue the other 2 are red.


P -2834.3999, -1466.7305, -4.8730, 240, 0, 0, 1, Fungus(jack)
P -2771.5137, -1363.2345, -6.4787, 240, 0, 0, 1, Fungus
P -2824.8796, -1318.0913, -4.9454, 240, 0, 0, 1, Fungus
P -3621.6404, -1110.9277, -4.3737, 240, 0, 0, 1, Fungus(jack)
P -3646.8450, -1027.2113, -4.8730, 240, 0, 0, 1, Fungus
P -3643.8936, -1068.5975, -4.8730, 240, 0, 0, 1, Fungus(jack)
P -3624.6748, -1170.1285, -4.8730, 240, 0, 0, 1, Fungus(jack)
P -3605.2979, -1169.7681, -4.8128, 0, 240, 240, 1, Fungus(blue_slumber)
P -3573.3296, -1158.5261, -4.1953, 240, 0, 0, 1, Fungus
P -3576.5991, -1087.9039, -0.4342, 240, 0, 0, 1, Fungus(jack)
P -3598.7712, -1090.5302, -2.8413, 240, 0, 0, 1, Fungus
P -3596.3281, -1119.2605, -3.3768, 240, 0, 0, 1, Fungus

Brownie Camp
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2009 at 11:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592262991057
Scholar
109 posts
I confirm previously mentioned comment about brownie camp in Lesser Faydark. I counted 7 of the sarcoscypha fungus surrounding the wall area of the brownie camp, as noted. Location of first fungus i found was Pos 1717.37, Pos 3075.07, Neg 1.22. (not sure if it is exact same spot every time) Then I just followed the circle around the brownie camp and found 6 more. (only took 1) Good Luck!


Aroara (83 druid)
~Silent Honor~
The Seventh Hammer
▲ Page top
gound spawn
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2008 at 12:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1613348248033
Scholar
50 posts
these are also ground spawn in the fairy camp i collected jack-o-lantern fungus,blue slumber fungus, and sarcosypha fungus all in fairy camp. The respawn time seems to vary but I was hunting in castle mistmoore between spawns for an item my mage needed but it seemed i could gather fungus go to mistmoore and clear out all the way to masulem and come back and the funguse were just beginning to respawn.

i was doing this on my level 51 mage and level 52 beastlord.

Edited, Jun 20th 2008 4:27pm by Galadormie

# Oct 02 2006 at 11:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592265278976
Scholar
130 posts
I've been hunting in Inny Swamp and have not found any mobs named "a corpse spore". But I have found "a fungus spore". They look like a baby "fungusman tracker" and drop sarcoscypha, although no often than the trackers do.

corpse spore?
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2007 at 2:51 PM Rating: Decent
snailish
4,580 posts
tamud wrote:
I've been hunting in Inny Swamp and have not found any mobs named "a corpse spore". But I have found "a fungus spore". They look like a baby "fungusman tracker" and drop sarcoscypha, although no often than the trackers do.


"A Fungus Spore" dropped it for me tonight as well. Tiny little mushroom, seemed to be a few of them up south east of the Plane of Knowledge book.
▲ Page top
extra info
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2006 at 9:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592772917456
153 posts
Like Coravin said, used to make Misty Glaze, and that is used for a pottery combine(102 trivial) to make a Crucible of Escape, which is a no-mana clicky lesser succor for druids and wizards. This Misty Glaze is crafted in a Glaze Mortar. A Glaze Mortar is sold in the Plane of Knowledge, a vendor near the small bank, I think...name starts with a "Del", something like that :)
▲ Page top
worth
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2006 at 6:36 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1719792988335
679 posts
Sarcoscypha Fungus sells for 0 plat 0 gold 1 silver 0 copper when offered to Sateal Deirosap vendor by level 2 human monk with 143 cha... Current bazaar prices range from 15 to 40 plat on bertox server...(UPDATE)10 to 32 plat now (11/30/2006)

Edited, Dec 1st 2006 4:20pm by smithgib

QuoteReply
# Apr 05 2003 at 7:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786078154
10 posts
Does anybody know WHICH tradeskill this is used for? I've gone through 4 sites so far and still am no closer to know where to use this.
▲ Page top
RE: Not very helpful
QuoteReply
# May 10 2003 at 11:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966168810
24 posts
An ingredient in Misty Glaze, which is used to make Crucible of Escape. Misty Glaze is non-tradeskill. But making the Crucible is pottery.

Edited, Sat May 10 12:22:01 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Not very helpful
QuoteReply

err, the tradeskills are listed in the top right of the corner.

and for any tradeskill info, www.eqtraders.com is your best place.
